base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of winged_ape_cave_ape_and_fossil_ape — a tile from 1995 chrono trigger. Winged Ape, Cave Ape, & Fossil Ape. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
